name: coordctl
description: Git-aware coordination tools for parallel Codex agent edits.

interface.longDescription: Standalone coordctl plugin for Git-aware agent coordination: sessions, hunk/file intent leases, heartbeat, cleanup, GC, status, and dry-run merge checks. It is the primary replacement path for coarse file-level coordination, while lockctl remains a legacy fallback.
defaultPrompt: Start a coordctl session for this repo and branch.
Acquire hunk-level edit intents before modifying tracked files.
Check coordctl status, heartbeat active sessions, and run cleanup when done.
